description: Real MITMA municipal-mobility zone <-> PNSG municipality crosswalk. Zone IDs and names are verbatim from https://movilidad-opendata.mitma.es/zonificacion/zonificacion_municipios/nombres_municipios.csv (pipe-delimited ID|name). For most municipalities the MITMA zone ID equals the INE municipal code; MITMA aggregates some small municipalities into multi-municipality zones, so a few PNSG municipalities do not appear as standalone zones and must be resolved from the MITMA zoning relation file when the ETL runs (marked resolved:false).

source.name: MITMA — Estudios de movilidad con Big Data (Open Data)

zones.name: Rascafría
zones.note: Not a standalone MITMA zone (aggregated); resolve from relacion_ine_zonificacion at ETL time.

zones.name: Lozoya
zones.note: Aggregated MITMA zone; resolve at ETL time.
